final:
module top_module( 
    input do_sub,
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    output reg [7:0] sum_diff,
    output reg result_is_zero
);always @(*) begin
        case (do_sub)
          0: sum_diff = a+b;
          1: sum_diff = a-b;
        endcase

        result_is_zero = (sum_diff == 0);
    end

endmodule
